name: batch_cp
description: Copy files or directories with automatic parent directory creation, backup creation, or multiple source files to a destination directory.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source file or directory path, or --dir flag to copy directory contents

parameters.name: --backup
parameters.description: Create a .bak copy of the source file

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step mkdir -p + cp patterns and backup-then-cleanup workflows with a single call, saving 2+ steps per file operation.
